message:
fix(lab): clippy fixes for scenario runner, saga, and replay tests (bd-1hu19.2)

- scenario_runner.rs: remove unused imports, contains() over iter().any(),
  map_or_else, remove redundant closure
- saga.rs: vec![] to array literal (useless_vec)
- replay_e2e_suite.rs: add allow(too_many_lines), fix similar_names
  (replayer → trace_verifier), add replay parity sweep test infrastructure
- type_substrate_integration.rs: formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
